name: wuxian-lunhui
description: 无限轮回 - 像素风动作Roguelike游戏
author: 开发者

scripts.dev: concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron electron/main.js"
scripts.build:portable: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false vite build && node scripts/copy-assets.js && electron-builder --win portable
